headline: SEC Eyes $1Tn ETF Market Reform Amid Crypto Surge

article.title: SEC seeks public comment on regulating next generation of ETFs
article.summary: The request from the US agency seeks feedback on how emerging ETF structures and investment strategies should be regulated as issuers roll out increasingly specialized products.

article.title: Financial companies join forces for US dollar stablecoin, keeping reserve earnings
article.summary: The project, supported by Visa, Mastercard and many crypto companies, could be in a position to challenge Tether’s USDT and Circle’s USDC, currently the two largest stablecoins by market capitalization.

headline: Trump Tariff Reversal Boosts Stocks 5% Overnight

article.title: Trump Tariff Defeat Is Market Tailwind ‘No One Is Talking About’
article.summary: The sweeping tariffs underpinning President Donald Trump’s economic policy may have gone from a headwind to a tailwind for the stock market, with the Supreme Court’s decision to unwind them setting the stage for a potential earnings boon for some companies.

article.title: Bitcoin Slides Below $60,000 as Strategy Selloff Refuels Anxiety
article.summary: Bitcoin tumbled as much as 3.5% toward $58,000 on Tuesday as investors reversed an initial vote of confidence in Michael Saylor’s financing overhaul at Strategy Inc., raising fresh concerns that one of the cryptocurrency’s biggest buyers may no longer be a consistent source of demand.

headline: Binance, Anchorage Launch $1B Crypto Settlement Service

article.title: Anchorage Digital and Binance Launch Off-Exchange Settlement for Institutional Crypto Trading
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Anchorage Digital and Binance Launch Off-Exchange Settlement for Institutional Crypto Trading
Anchorage Digital and Binance launched off-exchange settlement for institutional crypto trading, allowing institutions to trade on Binance while keeping their assets in segregated custody

article.title: Visa, Mastercard, And Over 140 Companies Launch Stablecoin Open USD
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Visa, Mastercard, And Over 140 Companies Launch Stablecoin Open USD
Visa, Mastercard, Stripe, Coinbase, and 140+ firms have launched Open USD (OUSD), a new yield-sharing stablecoin that aims to challenge Circle and reshape the economics of the $300 billion stablecoin market.

article.summary: The tokenized NYLIM Anemoy U.S. High Yield Corporate Bond Segregated Portfolio is launching in collaboration with Centrifuge.

headline: Kalshi Sports Markets Halted in Michigan Amid 30-Day Ban

article.title: Kalshi Sports Markets Banned in Michigan as Temporary Blackout Takes Effect
article.summary: A Michigan judge granted a restraining order preventing the prediction market from offering sports-related wagers for the next 14 days.

headline: Circle Shares Plummet 16% After Open USD Launch

article.title: Circle shares sink 16% after Open USD reveal, analysts say fears are ‘overblown’
article.summary: William Blair reiterated its Outperform rating on Circle's CRCL stock, calling Tuesday's selloff a buying opportunity.

headline: SEC Reviews ETF Rules Amid $1B Crypto Surge

article.title: SEC opens ETF rule review following crypto fund surge, prediction markets push
article.summary: The SEC is taking a fresh look at how a proposed fast-growing new class of ETFs tied to prediction markets should be regulated.

headline: Nato Spending Boosts 195,000 US Defence Jobs

article.title: Europe’s rearmament drive is sustaining 195,000 US defence jobs, Nato chief says
article.summary: Mark Rutte makes economic case for Donald Trump to remain committed to the alliance in FT interview

headline: $30 Trillion Wealth Shift Rocks Wall Street

article.title: The great wealth transfer rattling Wall Street
article.summary: Tens of trillions of dollars are moving between generations — and younger heirs feel little loyalty to traditional advisers
